mapper.select: select r.id, r.risk_code, r.name, r.description, r.probability, r.impact, r.level, r.status, r.response_strategy, r.task_id, t.name as task_name, r.phase_name, r.owner_id, u.real_name as owner_name, r.identified_at from risk_register r left join sys_user u on u.id = r.owner_id left join project_task t on t.id = r.task_id and t.is_deleted = 0 where r.id = #{id} and r.is_deleted = 0

select id, project_id, risk_code, name, description, probability, impact, level, status, response_strategy, task_id, phase_name, owner_id, identified_at, closed_at, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted from risk_register where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update risk_register set name = #{name}, description = #{description}, probability = #{probability}, impact = #{impact}, level = #{level}, response_strategy = #{responseStrategy}, task_id = #{taskId}, phase_name = #{phaseName}, owner_id = #{ownerId}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0
update risk_register set status = #{status}, closed_at = #{closedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select id as riskId, name as riskName, probability, impact, level from risk_register where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0 order by probability desc, impact desc, created_at desc
